candidates.why: This is the only explicit COGS-related D&A row above operating profit. However, it appears to be a component of the already selected parent row 'Cost of revenues/COGS' because the balancing row plus this D&A row reconcile to the selected total, so adding it separately would double count.
This is SG&A/distribution-related, not COGS-related, so it is not relevant to the COGS_DA bucket.
This is SG&A-related, not COGS-related, so it is not relevant to the COGS_DA bucket.

variables.notes: No separate COGS D&A should be added. 'Depreciation/Amortization in COGS' is already embedded within the selected 'Cost of revenues/COGS' total rather than sitting outside it.

candidates.why: This is an explicit D&A row for one selected XSGA component ('Distribution costs'), but it appears to be a sub-component already included in that selected parent row because the balancing row plus depreciation reconcile to the selected total.

This is an explicit SG&A D&A row tied to the selected administrative/SG&A bucket, but it appears already included in the selected parent row 'Administative expenses' because the balancing row plus this D&A reconcile to that selected total.
This belongs to COGS, not SG&A/XSGA, so it is not relevant to XSGA_DA.

variables.notes: No separate XSGA D&A should be added. The selected XSGA bucket consists of 'Distribution costs' and 'Administative expenses', and the explicit D&A rows shown for those buckets appear to be embedded sub-components of those selected totals. No separate R&D line is visible, and XRD is empty, so no R&D-specific D&A adjustment is warranted here.
